description: On January 23, 2026, the White House posted a photo showing President Trump and a penguin carrying a US flag while walking on Greenland, and emphasized, “Embrace the Penguin.” Now officially launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — Embrace the Penguin (PENGUIN), as a political-themed memecoin, brings global holders and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and permanent meme culture spreading onchain.
name: Embrace the Penguin
